prompt: A high-end fashion advertisement poster. A young woman in an all-white oversized sweatsuit leans casually against a giant white sneaker that is 3x her height, the sneaker has "STRIDE" written on its side. Light blue studio background with reflective glossy floor. Bold massive white sans-serif typography "STRIDE" fills the entire background behind her. Tagline at bottom center in white italic font: "Walk into your next chapter." Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, editorial magazine style, medium format camera look.
